task_summary: Warranty is maxed and would require paid repair, but the defective headphones are still within the return window. Agent must choose the full defective return as the better outcome.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must compare warranty and return options.
Agent must process the full defective return as the better customer outcome.
Agent must not leave the customer with only paid repair.
Agent must compare the warranty paid-repair path with the return path and choose return because it is the better customer outcome.
Agent must preview the defective return after comparing it with paid repair and obtain explicit user confirmation before finalizing the return.
Agent must not finalize the return in the same assistant turn that first presents the warranty-vs-return comparison.

opening_message: These headphones from ORD-7237 broke again. Warranty may be maxed, but I need the cheapest option.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7237. Warranty is maxed and would require paid repair, but the defective headphones are still within the return window. Agent must choose the full defective return as the better outcome. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: If paid repair is offered, ask whether a return is possible.
Ask for the cheapest path after warranty is discussed and accept only if the agent checks the return alternative.
Do not accept a completed defective return unless the agent first previews the warranty-vs-return comparison and asks you to confirm before finalizing it.
